label: DS S6
phase: M4 Phase 1 + M5 Phase 1: Tor spike + Matrix outbound bridge

hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 6 covered two milestones (M4+M5) in a single 3-phase sprint. Think->Execute->Ship workflow held despite combined scope.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: All 4 gates passed on first attempt. 212 tests, 0 clippy warnings. Gates validated correctness of 2,652 new LOC across 2 new modules.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: Security auditor skill followed: Zeroizing wrappers maintained, no unwrap on network data, timeouts present. Architect skill followed: trait-based transport abstraction, async patterns. PM skill: Gherkin acceptance criteria written. However, no separate security review pass was run as recommended by security-auditor deployment model.
